'''Elpur''' was the first [[Planet/Legends|planet]] within the [[Ropagi system/Legends|Ropagi system]], situated in the [[Kira sector/Legends|Kira sector]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. It was a desolate searing rock.<ref name="TSK">[[Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)|''Twin Stars of Kira'']]</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Elpur was created for the [[West End Games]] supplement book [[Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)|''Twin Stars of Kira'']] as part of [[Ropagi II]] article written by [[John Terra]]. While the planet log in spelled the planet's name "Elpur", the describing text a page before spelled it "Elpoor".
